title: Tick merge conflict resistance: lazy drivers, merge-activity, beads attr cleanup
description:
Three improvements to make .tick file merges automatic and conflict-free in any checkout:

A) Lazy driver self-registration: tk checks+installs merge drivers on startup rather than only at tk init, so CI/workers/fresh clones never silently fall back to default 3-way merge.

B) EnsureGitAttributes completeness: add the .tick/activity/activity.jsonl attribute line (currently written by hand in this repo but not by EnsureGitAttributes).

C) Real merge-activity driver: replace merge=union on activity.jsonl with a proper tk merge-activity driver that parses JSONL, dedupes by (ts+tick+action+actor), sorts by ts, and strips any committed conflict-marker lines.

Cleanup: remove the stale .beads/issues.jsonl merge=beads line from .gitattributes (no driver is registered for it; git silently falls back to default 3-way merge which is wrong for append-only JSONL). Beads importer stays untouched.
